title: gate2lut: new techlib, for converting Yosys gates to FPGA LUTs

features.name: implicit variable in always block
features.description: Code should include an always block using a variable that is not explicitly declared

features.name: combinational case with variable selector
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block with a case statement that selects between different operations based on a selector variable

features.name: output register with width mismatch
features.description: Code should include an output register with a different bit width than the input ports it receives values from
features.snippet:
input [15:0] s_a,
input [15:0] s_b,
output reg [16:0] s_o

features.name: conditional non-blocking assignments in always block
features.description: Code should include an always block with multiple conditional non-blocking assignments using if statements

features.name: bitwise operations in case branches
features.description: Code should include a case statement where different branches apply bitwise operations (OR, AND, XOR) to operands
